bugs.error_message: Wait for AI reviews did not recognize completed Copilot and Gemini reviews on PR #360
bugs.root_cause: The workflow only polled check-run names containing Copilot/Gemini, but the real completion signal on this repo was submitted PR reviews from the bot accounts for the head commit.
bugs.fix: Added PR review polling keyed to the current head SHA, kept check-run success as a fallback, and added a regression test for the workflow contract.

bugs.error_message: AdSense contract and public home tests failed after the adConfig refactor
bugs.root_cause: Tests still asserted placeholder/dev slot rendering and the old `slotId` variable name even though AdSense rendering is production-only and PageLayout now uses `adConfig`.
bugs.fix: Updated the AdSense contract test to assert stable slot markup, and changed public home unit/E2E tests to expect no ad slots outside production.

bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught

bugs.error_message: npm ci fails in Docker node:24-alpine due to peer dependency hoisting differences between npm 10 (Node 22 CI) and npm 11 (Node 24 Docker)
bugs.root_cause: CI runner used Node 22/npm 10 to generate lockfile, but Docker uses Node 24/npm 11 with stricter peer dep hoisting. npm 11 requires @tanstack/query-core at top level, npm 10 nested it and CI 'healed' the lockfile
bugs.fix: Upgraded CI Node version from 22 to 24, upgraded @tanstack/react-query to 5.100.6, aligned TanStack packages to latest compatible versions, exact-pinned @trpc/* packages, regenerated lockfile with npm 11

bugs.error_message: Vitest integration tests fail when run together: wrong document counts (e.g. expected 2 got 5 recipes)
bugs.root_cause: src/db/index.ts calls mongoose.connect(baseUri) at module-load time, before db-connect.ts beforeAll can connect to the worker-specific database. Pipeline test imported @/db, triggering early connection to base URI. db-connect.ts then saw readyState=2 and waited for that connection (to base DB), leaving both workers on the same default database. Additionally, createAdminUser() used getMongoClient().db() which resolved to a different database than mongoose.connection.
bugs.fix: db-connect.ts: added reconnect logic — if mongoose already connected to wrong database (state 1 or 2 with wrong db name), disconnect and reconnect to test_worker_<poolId>. pipeline.integration.test.ts: changed createAdminUser() to use mongoose.connection.db instead of getMongoClient().db(), and removed unused getMongoClient import.
